purpose: Provide the private registry-first query interface for TARS and Openclaw, delegating ranked retrieval to memory-api /registry/query.
dependencies: Memory API Header Auth credential in n8n
Registry Webhook Header Auth credential in n8n
failureModes: missing or invalid registry secret header
notes: TARS should use REG-03 as the first query path for saved-content questions instead of memory recall.
The workflow returns registry-native summaries and takeaways; TARS can decide how much to synthesize on top.
